title: Caucaea rhodosticta
taxonomy: Caucaea rhodosticta belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the genus Caucaea. It is a species of orchid found in South America. This plant is classified as a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows on land rather than on other plants. Caucaea rhodosticta is further classified as a member of the subtribe Maxillariinae. The taxonomy of this species may be subject to change as new research and discoveries are made.
